segments.text: La Pine homes, year-to-date 2026. At thirteen point five months of supply, buyers hold the cards.
three eighty-one thousand dollars this year, down 1 percent from last year.
thirteen point five months. a buyer's market.
ninety-nine days to contract. twelve days slower than last year.
Sellers getting 95 point 5 percent of ask. There is room to negotiate, but not much.
303 homes active. A lot of supply, not enough buyers pulling the trigger.
